title: Federally excluded providers paid by Medicaid (HHS spending dataset)
headline: 28 of 125 currently-active federally-excluded VA-resident NPIs (per NPPES practice state) received Medicaid payments somewhere in T-MSIS 2018–2024, per the HHS Medicaid Provider Spending dataset (2026-02-09 release). Combined paid amount across all state Medicaid programs: $8,487,744 over 217,655 claim lines. Each match is a 42 CFR § 455.436 audit-referral candidate that a state PI unit can pull and validate against the per-NPI exclusion-effective date in the LEIE / SAM sources. Two source-data limits to read carefully: (1) the HHS file has no state-of-payment column, so paid amounts aggregate across every state Medicaid program that paid the NPI — the VA-resident cohort is per NPPES practice state, NOT per state of payment; (2) the cohort's exclusion-effective dates are not pinned in the cohort export, so a row's paid amounts may include claim months that pre-date the exclusion. Per-NPI MMIS triage should reconcile against the LEIE / SAM effective date via the verification URLs in the per-state CSV.
denominator_note: Phase 1 pilot scope = the 125-NPI Virginia federally-excluded cohort (active LEIE or SAM, score >= 1.5; VA-resident per NPPES practice state). All-50-states roll-up follows once VA methodology clears DMAS review. Two source-data limits readers must keep in mind: the HHS source file does NOT carry a state-of-payment column (so paid amounts aggregate across every state Medicaid program that paid the NPI), and the cohort export does not currently pin per-NPI exclusion-effective dates (so a row's paid amount may include claim months that pre-date the exclusion; MMIS triage should reconcile each NPI's paid period against the LEIE / SAM effective date).

data.label: VA cohort NPIs paid by Medicaid
VA cohort NPIs not paid (in this dataset)

notes: Pilot state: Virginia. Per-state CSV at /api/v1/states/va/h29-excluded-paid.csv carries one row per matched NPI with the directory-side context columns (top_hcpcs_codes, exclusion_source, billing-or-servicing axis, first/last paid month) needed to interpret the paid-amount headline. Source-file schema: 7 columns (billing/servicing NPI, HCPCS, claim month, patients, claim lines, paid amount), 238M rows, no state-of-payment column. State attribution comes from NPPES practice state, not the spending file. The HHS source aggregates fee-for-service, managed care, and CHIP; matches catch MCO-side exposures that AINPI's H26 4-payer sweep currently misses behind authentication walls. Disclosure timing: publish when available and high confidence (locked-in 2026-05-14 per roadmap §10). DMAS receives 5-business-day review courtesy on VA-attributed rows before each refresh — operational courtesy, not a publication gate.
